name: Planet Factory
short_description: A small quick game about building a factory to launch planets into a solar system! Grow your base and increase production to make the ultimate factory for launching planets!
detailed_description:
A small quick game about building a factory to launch planets into a solar system! Grow your base and increase production to make the ultimate factory for launching planets!

Use your factory making skills to build a factory to produce planets and launch them into a solar system, doing so will allow you to produce goods faster and unlock more planets to produce and launch.

Once your solar system is done, activate supernova to upgrade your sun into a black hole, you then can start producing and launching stars into a galaxy around a black hole!
about_the_game:
A small quick game about building a factory to launch planets into a solar system! Grow your base and increase production to make the ultimate factory for launching planets!

Use your factory making skills to build a factory to produce planets and launch them into a solar system, doing so will allow you to produce goods faster and unlock more planets to produce and launch.

Once your solar system is done, activate supernova to upgrade your sun into a black hole, you then can start producing and launching stars into a galaxy around a black hole!
